title: 8 Habits a Godly Man Mistakes for Discipline
caption:
8 Habits a Godly Man Mistakes for Discipline (that are actually just performance)

The 5 a.m. gym video nobody needed to see except you. The five books you never open twice. The journal entry instead of the actual fix.

Discipline that exists to be seen isn't discipline. It's a costume.

Real work is boring on purpose. It doesn't need an audience, a tracker, or a caption. Ephesians 2:8-9: grace was never the wage you were working for. It was the gift you started from.

Do the version nobody photographs.

Save this and check your last 30 days against it.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #work #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
